acceptance_targets: [ch05-F001] PASS if the revised passage anchored to lines 355/363/371 shows Eli crossing into the meeting room and includes at least one in-room exchange that changes leverage between him and Theo; FAIL if the chapter still ends before entry or relies only on text confirmations.

[ch05-F002] PASS if the revised 343-371 segment contains (1) at least one sensory marker of Eli's panic while executing the transfer, (2) one Nora response line with emotional/boundary texture beyond command verbs, and (3) a final line describing a concrete event rather than a thematic summary; FAIL if these beats remain summarized.

[ch05-F003] PASS if no run longer than 9 consecutive paragraphs in the revised 269-301 span lacks Eli interiority, and at least two added paragraphs include explicit thought/sensation/memory tied to the immediate conflict; FAIL otherwise.

[ch05-F004] PASS if the revised line around 77 communicates the same motive without using the lexical sequence 'kept/stayed moving' and without mirroring the calibration syntax; FAIL if the current phrasing or close paraphrase remains.

[FBK-02-008] PASS if neither targeted line retains the "landed harder/landed exactly" construction and the revised reaction is concrete to this kitchen scene; FAIL if the chapter still uses the same impact-template wording at either cited line.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage anchored to lines 355/363/371 shows Eli crossing into the meeting room and includes at least one in-room exchange that changes leverage between him and Theo; FAIL if the chapter still ends before entry or relies only on text confirmations.
findings.problem: The transfer-and-meeting condition functions as the chapter's payoff, but the sequence is mostly timestamped logistics plus one-line confirmations and then a threshold cut. Causality is present, but dramatic consequence is deferred off-page, weakening chapter-level closure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand the payoff zone at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:355, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:363, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:371 into an on-page consequence scene: Eli and Theo physically enter the meeting space, encounter immediate social pressure, and register a concrete relational shift before chapter end.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised 343-371 segment contains (1) at least one sensory marker of Eli's panic while executing the transfer, (2) one Nora response line with emotional/boundary texture beyond command verbs, and (3) a final line describing a concrete event rather than a thematic summary; FAIL if these beats remain summarized.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift appears in the final movement: emotionally volatile repayment beats are rendered as procedural summary, and the closing sentence abstracts conflict into a moralized thesis ('choosing structure over vanishing') instead of landing on a concrete consequence. This softens pressure at the exact moment stakes peak.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:343 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:355 to render embodied stress and interpersonal friction in-scene (not checklist time jumps). Replace the abstract closing at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:371 with an observable action-level consequence.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no run longer than 9 consecutive paragraphs in the revised 269-301 span lacks Eli interiority, and at least two added paragraphs include explicit thought/sensation/memory tied to the immediate conflict; FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: There is a screenplay-style interiority drought: from the post-dinner rules spill into bedtime logistics, 10+ consecutive paragraphs run on external dialogue/action without Eli's thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment, flattening emotional processing during a key accountability phase.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the stretch bounded by snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:269 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:301, insert brief internal beats after pressure turns (for example after Theo's route rejection, after Imani's office boundary, and after Theo's graduation call-out) so Eli's internal cost is legible.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised line around 77 communicates the same motive without using the lexical sequence 'kept/stayed moving' and without mirroring the calibration syntax; FAIL if the current phrasing or close paraphrase remains.
findings.problem: Eli's line ('I thought if I kept moving...') is near-verbatim in cadence and core phrasing to a style-bible calibration example line marked non-copyable. This reads as calibration leakage rather than fresh character speech.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the dialogue beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:77 with new language that preserves Eli's avoidance logic but avoids the 'if I kept/stayed moving' construction and the example-line sentence shape.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if neither targeted line retains the "landed harder/landed exactly" construction and the revised reaction is concrete to this kitchen scene; FAIL if the chapter still uses the same impact-template wording at either cited line.
findings.problem: Recurring full-book formula metaphor pattern appears in 8 chapters (chapter_05, chapter_09, chapter_10, chapter_11, chapter_12, chapter_14, chapter_15, chapter_16): abstract dialogue units repeatedly "land harder" as impact shorthand. This chapter has two instances (snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1387, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1477). Chapter action: REPLACE.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1387 and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1477, replace the "landed" impact template with chapter-specific sensory or behavioral reactions tied to Theo's history in this room; do not add new "landed harder" variants elsewhere in this chapter.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
